idea-plugin.name: Prairie Theme
idea-plugin.description:
A light, warm theme inspired by prairie landscapes. Features cream backgrounds, warm earth tones, and excellent readability for long coding sessions.
Includes both editor color scheme and complete UI theme for a cohesive experience throughout the IDE.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Complete light theme with prairie color palette
  • Editor color scheme with syntax highlighting
  • UI theme for consistent interface styling
